name: Slime Factory Manager
description: Advanced automation script for the Slime Factory event that optimizes production, collection, and upgrades for maximum profits. Customized for Jacquie's account and gameplay preferences.
author: Jacquie
features: Detection and focus on special event boosts
Pixel-perfect clicking patterns to avoid detection
Variable timing to simulate human behavior

settings.name: username
settings.label: Roblox Username
settings.description: Your Roblox username for account synchronization

settings.name: autoCollect
settings.label: Auto-Collect Interval
settings.description: How often to collect slime (in seconds)

settings.name: upgradeStrategy
settings.label: Upgrade Strategy
settings.description: Which strategy to use when purchasing upgrades

settings.name: autoDeposit
settings.label: Auto-Deposit
settings.description: Automatically deposit slime for compound interest

settings.name: stealthMode
settings.label: Stealth Mode
settings.description: Use variable timing and movement patterns to avoid detection
